name: SSH Firewall Configuration
notes:
This rule detects SSH firewall configuration.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: mdecrevoisier
SIGMA Title: OpenSSH server firewall configuration on Windows (command)
SIGMA Description:Detects scenarios where an attacker configure the Windows firewall to allow incoming connections to perform stealthy lateral movement.


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

when the event matches ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%netsh%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%advfirewall%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%localport=%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%22%' ) OR ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%netsh%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%firewall%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%portopening%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%22%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY SSH Firewall Configuration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%netsh%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%advfirewall%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%localport=%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%22%' ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%netsh%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%firewall%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%portopening%' 	AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%22%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects SSH firewall configuration.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
